summary: Sprint 9 changes are primarily refactoring (code splits) and dependency upgrades with no new business logic. The analytics.py shim correctly re-exports invalidate_analytics_cache. The portfolios.py split faithfully duplicates and separates endpoints without logic changes. DashboardMetrics.tsx and PortfolioList.tsx receive props immutably and render without mutation. Test imports were correctly updated to match new module paths. The starlette 1.0.0 and pytest-asyncio 1.3.0 upgrades passed all 794 tests. The update_portfolio endpoint in the new portfolios.py now correctly calls invalidate_analytics_cache, which was previously missing — this is a net improvement. No financial calculation changes.

findings.title: _assert_portfolio_owner duplicated across 3 modules
findings.detail: The helper function _assert_portfolio_owner is copy-pasted into all three split modules. If the authorization logic changes it must be updated in 3 places.
findings.fix: Extract to app/api/portfolio_utils.py and import from there in a future sprint.
